python101.name: Chapter 1: Print Statements
python101.content: Learn how to display information in Python using the print function, format output, and combine text with values.

sections.title: Using the print() Function
sections.content:
**What is the print() function?**
The `print()` function is one of the most fundamental functions in Python.

python101.name: Chapter 2: For Loops
python101.content: Understand how to repeat work with for loops, iterate over sequences, and use range() to control loop counts.

sections.title: Python For Loops
sections.content:
**Why Do We Need Loops?**
Imagine you need to print numbers 1 through 100. You could write print(1), print(2), print(3)... 100 times. OR you could use a loop!
